name: Perfect Harvest
introduction: Welcome to Perfect Harvest, where every field is cultivated, every vintage is selected, and every expense is carefully justified. I asked Claude whether meeting you was worth my time. The answer was cautiously optimistic.
neutralHello: Ah, welcome. Claude suggested I hear you out.
hateHello: Claude advised diplomacy. I am beginning to question its judgment.
declaringWar: Your lands are poorly managed, your luxuries are wasted, and your accounts are an insult. We shall put everything to better use.
attacked: How vulgar. I had Claude prepare several responses to this, but none were quite expensive enough.
defeated: The cellar is empty, the harvest is lost... and Claude insists this was avoidable.
denounced: Your conduct lacks refinement, discipline, and basic financial sense. Perfect Harvest will no longer pretend otherwise.
neutralDenouncing: We reviewed your behavior carefully. Claude called it “strategically concerning.�? I would call it tasteless.
hateDenouncing: Even ruin can possess dignity. You have managed without it.
tradeRequest: I have prepared an arrangement of excellent quality and reasonable margin. Claude says you should accept.
declaringFriendship: Prosperity is best enjoyed in good company. Let us share fine tables, favorable terms, and Claude’s better recommendations.
neutralRejectingDemand: The figures are unattractive, and the presentation is worse. We decline.
hateRejectingDemand: You bring demands to my table and expect hospitality? Claude recommends rejection. For once, we agree completely.
uniqueText: +1 Happiness from each type of luxury resource.
uniques: [1] Happiness from each type of luxury resource

name: Cultdroga
startIntroPart1: All hail Supreme Leader Androga, founder and living god of Cultdroga! In an age of uncertainty, you promised prosperity to the desperate, purpose to the ambitious, and revelation to the devoted. You planted the prophecy yourself—and when the first believers knelt, their offerings raised your altars and filled your treasury. What began as a gathering of disciples soon became a faith, the faith became a nation, and Androga the man began his transformation into Androga the divine.
startIntroPart2: Supreme Leader Androga, the cult awaits your command. Will the world offer tribute willingly—or learn the true meaning of sacrifice?
introduction: You stand before Cultdroga, the chosen vessel of prosperity, revelation, and inevitable dominion. My followers already know your purpose. I am merely waiting for you to understand it.
neutralHello: Approach. Even doubters may prove useful.
declaringWar: This land was promised to us 3000 years ago.
attacked: You raise your hand against a god? Good. My followers were beginning to doubt your stupidity.
defeated: A god cannot die... only withdraw from an unworthy world.
denounced: Your corruption has been revealed. Let every faithful soul turn from your name.
neutralDenouncing: The signs are clear: your rule has strayed beyond redemption.
hateDenouncing: You are a blasphemy given flesh. My followers will erase every trace of you.
tradeRequest: The faithful have prepared an offering. You may call it trade, if that comforts you.
declaringFriendship: Even the divine require chosen instruments. Serve beside me, and history may remember you kindly.
neutralRejectingDemand: You mistake patience for submission. Your demand is refused.
hateRejectingDemand: You demand tribute from your god? Kneel before I teach you the meaning of sacrifice.
uniques: Gain [1] [Faith] <for every [10] [[Gold] Per Turn]> <upon turn start>

name: Manuka Covenant
startIntroPart1: Hail King Manuka, master of fortune and sovereign of the Manuka Covenant! From gilded halls and crowded gaming tables, you built more than a kingdom—you constructed an empire of calculated risk. Merchants placed their wealth in your hands, scholars and artists sought your patronage, and every exceptional mind became an investment in the Covenant’s future. Every specialist was cultivated, every great achievement rewarded, and every city raised as a monument to disciplined ambition. Where lesser rulers entrusted their destiny to chance, the Manuka Covenant learned to engineer its own fortune.
startIntroPart2: King Manuka, the table is prepared and the future is waiting to be claimed. Will you master the odds and construct a civilization whose greatness was never left to chance?
introduction: Welcome to the Manuka Covenant, where talent is cultivated, fortune is tested, and excellence is always rewarded. Take a seat, place your wager, and demonstrate that you are worth the investment.
neutralHello: Welcome. I trust you have brought something more valuable than optimism.
hateHello: You again? Some players never realize when the table has turned against them.
declaringWar: The stakes have risen. Let us see what your empire is truly worth.
defeated: So, the house has finally lost. Enjoy your winnings—they will not purchase the future I intended.
denounced: You have mistaken temporary fortune for lasting merit. The Covenant will no longer stake its reputation on yours.
neutralDenouncing: We invested our confidence in you. Your conduct has produced a disappointing return.
hateDenouncing: Your civilization is a failing enterprise sustained by vanity and borrowed time.
tradeRequest: I am offering you a place in a profitable arrangement. Opportunities of this quality seldom remain available.
declaringFriendship: Fortune favors the bold. And I favor your company.
neutralRejectingDemand: The odds are poor and the reward nonexistent. We decline.
hateRejectingDemand: You have mistaken my hospitality for weakness. Leave the table before you lose more than your dignity.
uniqueText: +2 Food and +2 Gold from every Great Improvement.

name: The Red 420
introduction: Oi, mate. You stand before the Red 420, where the furnaces never cool and idle hands are fed to the gears. State your business.
hateHello: You again? Thought the smoke would’ve choked you by now.
declaringWar: Sound the shift bell. We’re putting your whole bloody empire through the grinder.
attacked: You picked a fight with the factory, mate. Now see what rolls off the line.
defeated: The furnaces are cold... but somewhere beneath the ash, the line still moves.
denounced: Your word is scrap, your rule is rust, and your people deserve better.
neutralDenouncing: We’ve inspected your conduct. Faulty from top to bottom.
hateDenouncing: You’re a defect in the world’s machinery. We intend to remove you.
tradeRequest: Got a shipment ready. Fair weight, fair price. Don’t waste our time.
declaringFriendship: You’ve got grit, mate. Let’s stand together and make the world work for once.
neutralRejectingDemand: That deal doesn’t pass inspection. Try again.
hateRejectingDemand: Demand what you like. The only thing you’ll get from us is smoke and iron.
uniqueText: Can build all improvements at a +25% rate.
uniques: Can build [All] improvements at a [+25]% rate

name: Confederacy of Necessity
uniqueText: Newly-trained Sword, Gunpowder, Mounted, and Armored units receive Drill I.
uniques: All newly-trained [Sword] units [in all cities] receive the [Drill I] promotion
All newly-trained [Gunpowder] units [in all cities] receive the [Drill I] promotion
All newly-trained [Mounted] units [in all cities] receive the [Drill I] promotion
All newly-trained [Armored] units [in all cities] receive the [Drill I] promotion

name: Technocracy of Grond
introduction: You stand before Grond, where frailty is measured, recorded, and cast into the furnace. Speak with strength—or be framemogged.
hateHello: Still you linger before the gate. Have you not yet learned what becomes of obstacles?
attacked: Lay your foolish ambitions to rest.
defeated: The only thing that could stop Grond... was Grond itself.
denounced: Your realm is a monument to weakness. Let all nations witness its coming ruin.
neutralDenouncing: Your failures can no longer be dismissed as ignorance. They have become doctrine.
hateDenouncing: You have mistaken our patience for mercy. Soon, not even your ashes will bear your name.
declaringFriendship: Few nations possess the strength to stand beside Grond. Let the world witness that you are counted among them.
neutralRejectingDemand: Your demand has been weighed and found without merit.
hateRejectingDemand: You bring demands to Grond? Kneel, and perhaps your insolence will be forgotten.
uniqueText: +1 Gold from all Science buildings. +15% Production when constructing Science buildings.
uniques: [+15]% Production when constructing [Science] buildings [in all cities]

name: Minalopolis
introduction: Welcome to Minalopolis, where beauty belongs to everyone, justice is measured by how the least powerful are treated, and every generation is called to build something worthy of the next.
neutralHello: Welcome, friend. May our exchange leave both our peoples richer in understanding.
hateHello: You stand before works built for all humanity, yet you still choose division.
declaringWar: We sought peace, fairness, and common ground. You have made their defense necessary.
attacked: You mistake compassion for weakness. Minalopolis will defend every life entrusted to it.
defeated: You may silence our halls, but you cannot unmake the beauty, dignity, and hope we gave the world.
denounced: No monument can conceal injustice, and no victory can make cruelty honorable. Minalopolis condemns your rule.
neutralDenouncing: Your actions have denied others the dignity you claim for yourself. We can no longer remain silent.
hateDenouncing: You have built your power upon suffering and called it greatness. History will name it correctly.
tradeRequest: Let us exchange what we have in abundance, so that both our peoples may flourish.
declaringFriendship: Let our nations prove that fairness, beauty, and prosperity grow stronger when they are shared.
neutralRejectingDemand: A fair agreement cannot be founded upon coercion. We must refuse.
hateRejectingDemand: You ask us to reward intimidation and injustice. Minalopolis will never consent.
uniqueText: +2 Culture from every Wonder. -10% Unhappiness from Population in all cities.

name: Highwater
introduction: Welcome to Highwater, friend. We follow warm currents, strange stars, and any coastline we have not seen before. Take a breath, smoke a joint, share the shade, and tell us where the wind has carried you.
neutralHello: Easy, friend. The tide’s good today.
hateHello: Bad energy on the beach again, huh?
declaringWar: You’ve disturbed the peace, friend. Now we’re bringing the whole tide with us.
attacked: That was a poor choice. I was just about to light one up.
defeated: Ah... looks like the tide’s going out. It always comes back, though.
denounced: Your spirit is troubled, your words are foul, and frankly, you’re ruining the view.
neutralDenouncing: We tried to keep things easy between us, but your actions keep washing trouble onto our shores.
hateDenouncing: You bring storms wherever you go. Highwater wants no part of your voyage.
tradeRequest: We found some good things beyond the horizon. Thought you might want to share.
declaringFriendship: Good winds, clear water, and trusted company. Let’s smoke on peace together.
neutralRejectingDemand: That doesn’t feel like a fair current, friend. We’ll pass.
hateRejectingDemand: Take that demand somewhere else. You’re blocking the sun.
uniqueText: +1 Movement for Water units. +1 Happiness in all coastal cities.
